name: Show / hide hidden files in Finder
description: Toggle whether Finder shows dotfiles and ~/Library. Same as ⌘⇧. but as a tile. No permissions needed.

tiles.label: Hidden

action.payload: defaults write com.apple.finder AppleShowAllFiles -bool $([[ $(defaults read com.apple.finder AppleShowAllFiles 2>/dev/null) == "1" ]] && echo false || echo true) && killall Finder

tiles.info: Toggle whether Finder shows hidden files (dotfiles, ~/Library, etc.).
